name: narrate-vscode-extension
description: Local-first code narration with prompt handoff and incremental cache.

commands.title: Narrate: Toggle EDU Detail Level (Standard/Beginner/Full Beginner)
Narrate: Create Dead Code Cleanup Branch
Narrate: Apply Safe Dead Code Fixes
Narrate: Run Startup For Current Context
Narrate: Stop PG Enforcement For Workspace
Narrate: Resume PG Enforcement For Workspace
Narrate: Run Trust Score Workspace Scan
Narrate: Restart TypeScript + Refresh Trust Score

narrate.defaultMode.description: Default narration mode when opening the reading view.

narrate.reading.defaultViewMode.description: Default reading display mode. Exact is strict 1:1 line mapping.

narrate.reading.defaultPaneMode.description: Default reading pane placement when opening narration output.

narrate.reading.defaultSnippetMode.description: Exact mode source display: show source+meaning or narration-only lines.

narrate.reading.defaultEduDetailLevel.description: Education detail depth for plain-English narration rendering (standard, beginner, full beginner).

narrate.reading.showStatusBarControls.description: Show status-bar controls for Narrate view mode, pane mode, and refresh.

narrate.model.apiKey.description: API key for the OpenAI-compatible provider. Leave empty to use local fallback narration.

narrate.cache.maxEntries.description: Maximum narration cache entries stored locally.

narrate.licensing.placeholderPlan.description: Local development plan selector used only when licensing mode is placeholder.

narrate.licensing.mode.description: Licensing source: local placeholder config or backend entitlement service.

narrate.licensing.apiBaseUrl.description: Backend licensing API base URL used when mode is backend.

narrate.licensing.sessionToken.description: Optional manual bearer token for backend licensing and Trust Score server evaluation. Normally this is populated by Narrate sign-in automatically; use only as a local fallback override.

narrate.licensing.publicKeyPem.description: Optional pinned PEM public key used for entitlement token verification. If empty, key is fetched from backend.

narrate.licensing.autoRefreshOnStartup.description: When backend mode is enabled, automatically attempts license refresh on startup.

narrate.enforcement.projectFramework.description: Framework hint passed to PG enforcement checks (for example: nextjs, nestjs, spring, react).

narrate.startupGuard.enabled.description: Detect PG or Memory-bank workspace context and keep local startup enforcement active until it is explicitly stopped for that workspace.

narrate.startupGuard.autoRunOnContextCha.description: Automatically run .\pg.ps1 start -Yes when Narrate enters a new repo/subrepo context, when a new UTC day begins, or when a blocked workspace is resumed.

narrate.enforcement.postWrite.enabled.description: Run PG enforcement trigger after file save.

narrate.enforcement.postWrite.debounceMs.description: Debounce delay for post-write enforcement trigger.

narrate.enforcement.postWrite.showNotifi.description: Show VS Code toast notifications when post-write enforcement reports blockers/errors.

narrate.enforcement.prePush.enabled.description: Run PG enforcement preflight before Narrate PG Push executes git push.

narrate.enforcement.prePush.warnOnly.description: Run PG pre-push enforcement in warn mode (non-blocking).

enumDescriptions: Use lifecycle recommended profile or standard
Dependency + coding + API contract + DB index
narrate.enforcement.prePush.prodProfile.description: PG Prod rollout profile used during pre-push enforcement. auto uses lifecycle-recommended or standard.

narrate.governance.autoSync.enabled.description: Automatically poll governance decisions and apply/ack through local PG worker.

narrate.governance.autoSync.intervalSeco.description: Polling interval for extension governance auto-sync worker.

narrate.governance.autoSync.requireBacke.description: Run governance auto-sync only when licensing mode is backend.

narrate.governance.autoSync.dryRun.description: Run governance auto-sync in dry-run mode (no local execution).

narrate.governance.autoSync.showNotifica.description: Show notifications when background governance auto-sync fails.

narrate.governance.stateFile.description: Optional path to governance worker state JSON file. If empty, pg defaults are used.

narrate.trustScore.enabled.description: Enable server-backed Trust Score checks on save/editor change.

narrate.trustScore.showStatusBar.description: Show Trust Score in status bar.

narrate.trustScore.autoRefreshOnSave.description: Automatically refresh Trust Score on save and editor switch. Narrate sends active file context to backend trust evaluation.

narrate.trustScore.validationLibraryPoli.description: Validation package policy metadata sent with Trust Score requests for controller/route files. required blocks when no supported validation package is detected.

narrate.trustScore.autoSuggestValidation.description: Show setup prompt when Trust Score detects missing validation setup.

narrate.trustScore.showDiagnosticsRecove.description: Show hint to restart TypeScript server and refresh Trust Score when diagnostics blockers persist.

narrate.trustScore.pgPushGateMode.description: Controls Trust Score enforcement during Narrate PG Push. off: ignore trust gate, relaxed: warn then allow continue, strict: block push when trust is red/blocking.

narrate.trustScore.workspaceScanMaxFiles.description: Maximum files processed by Narrate: Run Trust Score Workspace Scan.

narrate.trustScore.workspaceScanIncludeG.description: Include glob for workspace Trust scan command.

narrate.trustScore.workspaceScanExcludeG.description: Exclude glob for workspace Trust scan command.

narrate.deadCodeScan.maxFiles.description: Maximum files processed by Narrate dead-code scan.

narrate.deadCodeScan.includeGlob.description: Include glob for dead-code scan candidate discovery.

narrate.deadCodeScan.excludeGlob.description: Exclude glob for dead-code scan candidate discovery.

narrate.deadCodeScan.pgPushGateMode.description: Dead-code enforcement mode for Narrate PG Push. strict blocks push when high-confidence unused findings exist, relaxed warns and allows manual continue.

narrate.apiContract.maxFiles.description: Maximum files processed by API Contract Validator.

narrate.apiContract.includeGlob.description: Include glob used by API Contract Validator.

narrate.apiContract.excludeGlob.description: Exclude glob used by API Contract Validator.

narrate.codebaseTour.maxFiles.description: Maximum files processed by Narrate codebase tour scan.

narrate.codebaseTour.includeGlob.description: Include glob for codebase tour discovery.

narrate.codebaseTour.excludeGlob.description: Exclude glob for codebase tour discovery.

narrate.commitQuality.pgPushGateMode.description: Commit message quality enforcement mode for Narrate PG Push. strict blocks weak/generic messages, relaxed warns but allows manual override.

narrate.commitQuality.requireConventiona.description: Require conventional commit format during PG Push (type(scope): summary).

narrate.commitQuality.rejectGenericMessa.description: Reject generic commit messages such as fix/update/wip during PG Push quality checks.

narrate.commitQuality.minSummaryLength.description: Minimum summary length required by PG Push commit quality gate.

narrate.export.outputDir.description: Directory used for narration export artifacts. Relative paths resolve from workspace root.

narrate.export.includeGlob.description: Glob used for workspace export candidate files.

narrate.export.excludeGlob.description: Exclude glob used by workspace exports.

narrate.export.maxFiles.description: Maximum number of files processed by workspace export.

narrate.export.maxCharsPerFile.description: Skip files above this character length during workspace export to control runtime.

narrate.report.outputSubdir.description: Subfolder under export output where change report markdown files are written.

narrate.dbIndex.serverEnvPath.description: Path to .env file used by DB index maintenance check to resolve DATABASE_URL.

narrate.dbIndex.seqScanThreshold.description: Sequential-scan count threshold for DB index check. 0 means use script default.

narrate.mcpCloudScore.apiBase.description: MCP cloud scoring API base URL. Empty uses script default.

narrate.mcpCloudScore.stateFile.description: Path to MCP cloud score state JSON file. Empty uses script default.

narrate.mcpCloudScore.workloadSensitivit.description: Workload sensitivity level passed to MCP cloud score verifier.

narrate.observability.apiBase.description: Observability check API base URL. Empty uses script default.

narrate.observability.stateFile.description: Path to observability check state JSON file. Empty uses script default.

narrate.observability.rolloutPack.description: Saved observability rollout pack preset. Empty prompts selection on first run.
